rulings.Case Title: PHYLLIS VOISENAT VS. JOHN METHENY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Per Ex Parte Order Shortening Time For Hearing For Preliminary Injunction Signed Oct. 3, 2002. (Ajr/D302)
rulings.Rulings: MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION DENIED - NO SHOWING BY VOISENAT OF PROBABILITY OF SUCCESS - NO CASE LAW OR AUTHORITY SHOWING 28.5% SHARES HELD BY METHENY PER AMENDED OPERATING AGREEMENT SHOULD BE RETURNED TO VOISENAT. IN ADDITION, CONSIDERING FUTURE OF MINING LLC THERE IS NO SHOWING THAT VOISENT IF PUT IN CONTROL COULD DO BETTER THAN PRESENT OFFICERS AND MIGHT DO WORSE GIVEN PREVIOUS DISPUTE. (302/AJR/AA)

rulings.Case Title: AG/CCR LAS VEGAS I, LLC VS. BRUGNARA PROPERTIES V, LLC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ag/Ccr Las Vegas I, Llc'S Motion For Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: COURT CONSIDERS OPPOSITION IN FURTHERANCE OF JUSTICE AND DENIES MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION ON FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION ON THE GROUNDS THERE ARE TRIABLE ISSUES OF FACT REGARDING WHETHER PAYMENTS MADE ARE RENT PAYMENTS UNDER 6.4(A) OF PURCHASE AGREEMENT OR WHETHER PAYMENTS MADE AFTER CLOSING. CONTESTED FACTS RE WALGREENS, SEILER AND DREAM CAR. (302/AJR/KS(EX))

rulings.Case Title: JANE DOE et al VS. STEVEN LAWRENCE KATZ MD et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Defendant Katz's and Fertility Medical Associates' Demurrer: 2nd C/A: Medical Negligence-Informed Consent Sustain with leave to amend 3rd C/A: Common Law Negligence Overrule 4th C/A: Breach of Contract Overrule 5th C/A: Fraud by Concealment Overrule 6th C/A: Intentional Infliction of Emotional Distress Overrule 7th C/A: Negligent Infliction of Emotional Distress Sustain, duplicative 8th C/A: Unlawful Business Practices (Civil Code Section 1770) Overrule 9th C/A: Breach of Fiduciary Duty Sustained 10th C/A: Abrogation of Plaintiff's Right to Privacy Overrule. (302/AJR/RS)

rulings.Case Title: JANE DOE et al VS. STEVEN LAWRENCE KATZ MD et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION To Strike Portions Of Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Defendant Katz's and Fertility Medical Associates' Motion to Strike: 1. Prayer for attorney's fees: Granted with leave to amend to assert attorney's fee clause in contract. 2. Prayer for punitive damages: Deny. (302/AJR/RS)

rulings.Case Title: JANE DOE et al VS. STEVEN LAWRENCE KATZ MD et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT

Defendant El Danasouri's Motion to Strike: punitive damages: deny. (302/AJR/RS)
